prestazioni: Upgrade to a Weistec Engineering Stage 3+ M177/M178 (GLS63 AMG's 4.0L V8 Biturbo) twin-turbo system featuring custom-machined billet compressor wheels with 76mm inducers and 106mm exducers, paired with Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos, supporting 850+ WHP on E85 with a Weistec port-injection fuel system (1,200cc injectors + dual CP4.2 pumps) and a Motec M150 ECU for closed-loop lambda control

Installation of a H&R Monoball Subframe Kit (GLS-specific) to eliminate subframe deflection under 1.5G lateral loads, combined with KW Clubsport 3-way coilovers (10-position rebound, 12-position compression, and adjustable top mounts) with custom valving for the GLS63's 2,655kg curb weight, plus an additional H&R 25mm rear sway bar to reduce body roll by 38%

Full drivetrain reinforcement via a Quaife ATB LSD (GLS63 4MATIC+ rear-specific) with 45/55 torque bias, paired with a South Bend Clutch Stage 3 twin-disc setup (ceramic-metallic friction material) and a Weistec aluminum driveshaft to handle 1,100Nm of torque, alongside a Mercedes-AMG Performance 8-speed MCT transmission tune with launch control set to 4,500 RPM and shift times reduced to 120ms
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny GLS63 widebody kit (Pandem Design) with carbon fiber fenders (3.5-inch wider front, 4.2-inch wider rear), custom-machined aluminum fender flares, and integrated carbon fiber side skirts with air curtains for brake cooling, finished in Selenite Grey Magno with matte black accents

Custom 22-inch Rotiform LAS-R wheels (front: 10.5x22 ET25, rear: 12x22 ET35) with staggered 295/30R22 and 325/25R22 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires, paired with AP Racing 6-piston front (405mm discs) and 4-piston rear (380mm discs) big brake kit with two-piece rotors and titanium pistons for 40% weight reduction

Full carbon fiber aero package including a Vorsteiner GLS63-specific front splitter with integrated canards, a custom 3D-printed rear diffuser (30% more downforce than OEM) with active Gurney flaps, and a Mercedes-AMG GT Black Series-inspired fixed rear wing (carbon fiber, 1.8m span) mounted on aluminum pedestals with adjustable angle of attack (0-15 degrees) for 220kg of downforce at 200km/h
